query: SELECT l.id, l.name, l.score, COUNT(m.id) as msg_count, SUM(CASE WHEN m.direction='inbound' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inbound_count, MAX(m.timestamp) as last_msg FROM crm_leads l LEFT JOIN crm_messages m ON m.leadId = l.id GROUP BY l.id, l.name, l.score ORDER BY msg_count DESC LIMIT 15
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute SELECT l.id, l.name, l.score, COUNT(m.id) as msg_count, SUM(CASE WHEN m.direction='inbound' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inbound_count, MAX(m.timestamp) as last_msg FROM crm_leads l LEFT JOIN crm_messages m ON m.leadId = l.id GROUP BY l.id, l.name, l.score ORDER BY msg_count DESC LIMIT 15
